ontology.foodon_gap_note: FoodOn has a generic hamburger class (FOODON_00002383); no specific entry exists for Jollibee Cheesy Yumburger Meal. Closest parent used.
ontology.foodex2_gap_note: FoodEx2 A0FAN covers hamburgers and similar products; no specific code for Jollibee Cheesy Yumburger Meal. Closest parent used.
ontology.snomed_ct_gap_note: No specific SNOMED CT concept exists for this fast food meal product.

serving.description: 1 meal set (burger + regular fries + regular soft drink)
serving.natural_language_portion: One Cheesy Yumburger Meal (D) consists of one Cheesy Yumburger (approximately 150 g), one regular serving of french fries (approximately 110 g), and one regular soft drink (approximately 290 g / 290 ml), totalling approximately 550 g per meal set.

nutrient_source.title: Jollibee Nutrition Information — Cheesy Yumburger and Meal Components (estimated from USDA FoodData Central analogous fast food burger, fries, and cola entries)
nutrient_source.organization: USDA FoodData Central (SR Legacy / Foundation Foods) — analogous fast food items
nutrient_source.source_match_notes: No direct Jollibee Cheesy Yumburger Meal entry exists in HPB Singapore Foodo, USDA Branded Foods, or ICMR-NIN. Nutrient values are estimated by compositing USDA FoodData Central SR Legacy entries for analogous fast food items: (1) fast food hamburger with cheese on bun (FDC ID 171938), (2) fast food french fries (FDC ID 170720), and (3) regular cola soft drink (FDC ID 174851), weighted by estimated serving proportions (burger ~150 g, fries ~110 g, cola ~290 g, total ~550 g). Per-100g values are derived from this composite. Confidence is medium due to estimation.

gi_source.title: International tables of glycemic index and glycemic load values: 2021 — fast food hamburger bun and refined starch components
gi_source.source_match_notes: No direct GI measurement exists for Jollibee Cheesy Yumburger Meal. GI of 65 is estimated from the University of Sydney GI Database analogous entries: white bread / refined burger bun (GI ~70), french fries (GI ~63), and cola soft drink (GI ~63). A weighted composite GI of approximately 65 is applied, placing this meal in the medium GI category. Glycemic load per serving calculated as: (GI × carbohydrate_g per serving) / 100 = (65 × 145.75) / 100 ≈ 94.7 g, where carbohydrate per 550 g serving = 26.5 × 5.5 = 145.75 g.

hypertension.key_factor: High sodium content (~310 mg per 100 g; ~1705 mg per meal serving)
hypertension.guidance: Individuals with hypertension should limit or avoid this meal, as a single serving provides approximately 74% of the WHO recommended daily sodium limit of 2300 mg, primarily from the processed cheese, burger sauce, and seasoned fries.

type2_diabetes.key_factor: High glycemic load (~94.7 per meal) and high refined carbohydrate content from bun, fries, and cola
type2_diabetes.guidance: People with Type 2 Diabetes should avoid or strictly limit this meal due to its very high glycemic load driven by the refined burger bun, french fries, and sugar-sweetened cola, all of which cause rapid postprandial blood glucose elevation.

cardiovascular_disease.key_factor: Saturated fat (~2.8 g per 100 g; ~15.4 g per meal), trans fat (~0.2 g per 100 g), and high sodium
cardiovascular_disease.guidance: This meal is high in saturated fat, contains trans fat from frying, and delivers a large sodium load, all of which are established risk factors for cardiovascular disease; individuals with CVD risk should avoid regular consumption.

llm_training.natural_language_description: The Cheesy Yumburger Meal (D) is a fast food combo meal sold at Jollibee restaurants in Singapore, including the Bugis Village outlet. It consists of a Cheesy Yumburger — Jollibee's signature beef burger featuring a seasoned beef patty topped with a processed American-style cheese slice, shredded lettuce, and mayonnaise in a soft white bun — served alongside a regular portion of salted french fries and a regular-sized cola soft drink. The burger is known for its mild, slightly sweet flavour profile that appeals to Southeast Asian palates, with a soft and pillowy bun texture contrasting the savoury, juicy beef patty and creamy melted cheese. As a meal set, it is calorie-dense, providing an estimated 1072 kcal per full serving (~550 g), with high refined carbohydrate content from the bun, fries, and cola, significant sodium from the cheese and seasoning, and moderate saturated fat. Clinically, this meal is of high concern for individuals managing hypertension, Type 2 Diabetes, or cardiovascular disease due to its very high glycemic load, sodium content, and saturated and trans fat levels. It is certified Halal and is a popular choice among Muslim consumers in Singapore. Jollibee is a Filipino-origin fast food chain with a strong presence in Southeast Asia and a growing international footprint.
common_user_queries: What is in a Jollibee Cheesy Yumburger Meal?
How many calories in a Cheesy Yumburger Meal D?
Is the Jollibee Cheesy Yumburger Halal in Singapore?
Is Cheesy Yumburger Meal suitable for diabetics?

confidence_reason: No direct Jollibee Cheesy Yumburger Meal entry was found in HPB Singapore Foodo, USDA Branded Foods, ICMR-NIN, or FAO/INFOODS SEA databases. Nutrient values are estimated by compositing USDA FoodData Central SR Legacy analogous fast food entries for a cheeseburger, french fries, and cola, weighted by estimated serving sizes. GI is estimated from University of Sydney GI Database analogous entries. Confidence is medium due to the composite estimation approach.
notes: Vitamin D (vitamin_d_mcg) is set to -1 as it is not reported in the USDA FoodData Central analogous fast food source entries used for this composite estimate. Vitamin E (vitamin_e_mg) is set to -1 as it is not reported in the analogous source entries. Selenium (selenium_mcg) is set to -1 as it is not reported in the analogous source entries. Monounsaturated fat, polyunsaturated fat, trans fat, potassium, calcium, iron, cholesterol, vitamin C, vitamin A, B-vitamins, folate, phosphorus, magnesium, and zinc are estimated from USDA SR Legacy analogous fast food composite. The meal is listed as Halal on field survey data (Jollibee - Bugis Village). Serving size of 550 g is an estimate based on typical Jollibee meal set composition (burger ~150 g, fries ~110 g, cola ~290 g). Glycemic load per serving of 94.7 is calculated as (65 × 145.75) / 100 where 145.75 g is the estimated carbohydrate content of the full 550 g serving. This record requires verification against official Jollibee Singapore nutrition disclosure if and when published.
